_meta.resume_note: The complete official 2025-2026 Associate Degrees & Certificates program inventory contains no general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS.

none_found_sources.locator: Printed catalog page 3, complete table of contents for Associate Degrees & Certificates programs on pages 81-138; no Economics program is listed

notes: College of the Redwoods publishes Economics coursework used in Business and other programs, but its complete 2025-2026 associate-award program inventory does not publish an Economics-titled degree. Business and Liberal Arts: Social and Behavioral Sciences awards are umbrella or adjacent awards and are outside this pass.
